Interface AIStrategy

All Known Implementing Classes:
EasyStrategy, HardStrategy, MediumStrategy
public interface AIStrategy
Defines the contract for AI turn selection and discard decisions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GemColor
    chooseGemToDiscard(GameState state, Player self)
    Chooses a gem to discard after exceeding the token limit.
    AIAction
    selectAction(GameState state, Player self)
    Selects an action for the current turn.
